---
title: "Orman Research Task 1"
output: html_document
---

# Short versus Long term memory

The simple explanation of the difference between short and long term time series models is that short term models have ACF lags up to a point k, whereas long memory models are larger or infinite. Typically, K is a very large number. (10,000 units of distance or so)


## Short Memory Example

```{r}
y <- arima.sim(list(ma=1), n=200)
acf(y, main=paste("ARMA with (", 1, 1, ")"))
```


```{r}
set.seed(123)

# 1. Simulate a short-memory ARMA(1,1)
phi <- 0.6   # AR(1) coefficient
theta <- 0.4 # MA(1) coefficient
n <- 300
y <- arima.sim(list(order=c(1,0,1), ar=phi, ma=theta), n=n)

# 2. Compute sample autocorrelation (ACF)
acf_obj <- acf(y, plot=FALSE)
acf_vals <- acf_obj$acf[-1]      # remove lag 0
lags <- 1:length(acf_vals)

# 3. Theoretical-style geometric and exponential decays for comparison
geo_decay <- phi^lags            # geometric (AR-like)
exp_decay <- exp(-0.2*lags)      # exponential (arbitrary lambda=0.2 for visual fit)

# 4. Plot
plot(lags, abs(acf_vals), type="h", lwd=2, col="steelblue",
     main=sprintf("Short-memory ARMA(1,1): phi=%.1f, theta=%.1f", phi, theta),
     ylab="ACF", xlab="Lag", ylim=c(-0.2,1))

# 5. Overlay decay curves
lines(lags, geo_decay, col="darkred", lwd=2, lty=2)
lines(lags, exp_decay, col="forestgreen", lwd=2, lty=3)

# 6. Add legend
legend("topright", legend=c("Sample ACF", "Geometric decay", "Exponential decay"),
       col=c("steelblue","darkred","forestgreen"), lty=c(1,2,3), lwd=2, bty="n")

```



## Long Memory Example

```{r}
# --- Compare short vs long memory processes ---
set.seed(123)

# --- 1. Short-memory: ARMA(1,1) ---
phi <- 0.6
theta <- 0.4
n <- 500
y_short <- arima.sim(list(order=c(1,0,1), ar=phi, ma=theta), n=n)
acf_short <- acf(y_short, plot=FALSE)
lags_short <- 1:length(acf_short$acf[-1])
acf_vals_short <- acf_short$acf[-1]

# Geometric decay for comparison
geo_decay <- phi^lags_short
exp_decay <- exp(-0.2 * lags_short)

# --- 2. Long-memory: ARFIMA(0,d,0) ---
d <- 0.4   # fractional difference parameter (0 < d < 0.5 gives long memory)
y_long <- fracdiff.sim(n=n, d=d)$series
acf_long <- acf(y_long, plot=FALSE)
lags_long <- 1:length(acf_long$acf[-1])
acf_vals_long <- acf_long$acf[-1]

# Theoretical hyperbolic decay ~ h^(2d - 1)
hyper_decay <- lags_long^(2*d - 1)

# Long-memory plot
plot(lags_long, acf_vals_long, type="h", lwd=2, col="darkorange",
     main=sprintf("Long-memory ARFIMA(0,%.1f,0)", d),
     xlab="Lag", ylab="ACF", ylim=c(-0.2,1))
lines(lags_long, acf_vals_short, lwd=2, col="blue")
lines(lags_long, hyper_decay, col="purple", lwd=2, lty=2)


lags <- 1:length(acf_vals_long)
geo_decay <- phi^lags            # geometric (AR-like)
exp_decay <- exp(-0.2*lags)      # exponential (arbitrary lambda=0.2 for visual fit)
lines(lags, geo_decay, col="darkred", lwd=2, lty=2)
lines(lags, exp_decay, col="forestgreen", lwd=2, lty=3)

legend("topright", legend=c("Sample ACF", "Hyperbolic decay ~ h^(2d-1)"),
       col=c("darkorange","purple"), lty=c(1,2), lwd=2, bty="n")

```


```{r}
# --- Compare short vs long memory ACFs on the same plot ---

# --- 1. Short-memory ARMA(1,1) ---
phi <- 0.6
theta <- 0.4
n <- 5000
y_short <- arima.sim(list(order=c(1,0,1), ar=phi, ma=theta), n=n)
acf_short <- acf(y_short, plot=FALSE)
lags <- 1:length(acf_short$acf[-1])
acf_vals_short <- acf_short$acf[-1]

# --- 2. Long-memory ARFIMA(0,d,0) ---
d <- 0.4
y_long <- fracdiff.sim(n=n, d=d)$series
acf_long <- acf(y_long, plot=FALSE)
acf_vals_long <- acf_long$acf[-1]

# --- 3. Plot both ACFs together ---
plot(lags, acf_vals_short, type="h", lwd=2, col="steelblue",
     main=sprintf("ACF Comparison: ARMA(1,1) vs ARFIMA(0,%.1f,0)", d),
     xlab="Lag", ylab="ACF", ylim=c(-0.1,1), xlim=c(0,20))
lines(lags + 0.1, acf_vals_long, lwd=2, col="red", type='h')

# Optional: overlay theoretical decays
lines(lags, phi^lags, col="darkred", lty=2, lwd=1)            # geometric
lines(lags, lags^(2*d - 1) / max(lags^(2*d - 1)),             # normalized hyperbolic
      col="purple", lty=3, lwd=1)

# --- 4. Add legend ---
legend("topright",
       legend=c("Short-ARMA ACF","Long-ARFMA ACF","Geometric decay","Hyperbolic decay"),
       col=c("steelblue","red","darkred","purple"),
       lty=c(1,1,2,3), lwd=2, bty="n")

```
